question: Which of the following best describes the overall trend in the unemployment rate from 2007 to 2022?

options.A: It remains roughly constant throughout the period.
options.B: It shows substantial fluctuations over the period.
options.C: It steadily decreases over the entire period.
options.D: It steadily increases over the entire period.

explanation: The inverted Y-axis makes the series appear increasing when it is actually decreasing.
